title: Add relevant images for every search result item

requirements.text: Ensure every clothing item returned by backend `searchItems` has a non-empty, valid local photo path (served from `/assets/generated/...`) so that every search result can display an item-relevant image instead of the generic fallback.

quotes: additonally add relevant images for each search result

acceptanceCriteria: For all seeded `ClothingItem`s in `backend/main.mo`, the `photo` field is non-empty and starts with `/assets/generated/`.
Running searches that return seeded items results in each item having a `photo` value that points to an existing static asset filename (no empty strings).

requirements.text: Add the missing static image assets under `frontend/public/assets/generated` for the photo filenames referenced by backend seeded items, using attribute-relevant visuals (matching item type/color/pattern) so search results show meaningful images.

quotes: additonally add relevant images for each search result

acceptanceCriteria: Each backend-seeded `/assets/generated/<filename>` resolves to an existing file under `frontend/public/assets/generated/<filename>`.
Visiting the Results page for searches that return seeded items displays item photos (not the hanger fallback) for all results whose `photo` paths exist.

requirements.text: Update the backend seeded `photo` filenames as needed to exactly match the generated static asset filenames (including extension and any `.dim_<WxH>` suffixes), so the Results grid reliably loads images without 404s.

quotes: additonally add relevant images for each search result

acceptanceCriteria: All `photo` strings in `backend/main.mo` seed data exactly match the filenames added under `frontend/public/assets/generated` (case-sensitive match).
Direct browser navigation to each `/assets/generated/<filename>` used by seeded items returns the image (no 404).

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in `backend/main.mo`; only add `backend/migration.mo` if an upgrade to existing stable state is required.
Do not edit files in `frontend/src/components/ui` or other frontend immutable paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Do not proxy static images through the backend; images must be served as static frontend assets under `frontend/public/assets/generated`.
nonGoals: Do not integrate any external image APIs or third-party image hosting.
Do not add new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity.
Do not add new backend services or databases.
